query:
SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.sceneIndex,
  s.status as scene_status,
  s.taskId,
  s.errorMessage,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, s.updatedAt, NOW()) as mins_since_update,
  j.status as job_status,
  j.fallbackProvider,
  j.errorMessage as job_error
FROM musicVideoScenes s
JOIN musicVideoJobs j ON j.id = s.jobId
WHERE s.jobId = 510025
ORDER BY s.sceneIndex;
